input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.4.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.4.4.3
            TITLE: a glv measuring point (glvmp) must be installed which is:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.4.4.3: A GLV Measuring Point (GLVMP) must be installed which is:
EV.4.4.3 A GLV Measuring Point (GLVMP) must be installed which is:  
a. Connected to GLV System Ground  
b. Next to the TSMP  EV.5.8 
c. 4 mm shrouded banana jack  
d. Color:  Black 
e. Marked “GND”

final_answer:
A GLV Measuring Point (GLVMP) must be installed which is:
a. Connected to GLV System Ground
b. Next to the TSMP EV.5.8
c. 4 mm shrouded banana jack
d. Color: Black
e. Marked “GND”
